title: handpiston
description: Use the PISTON directly in your hand, like a new tool.
body:
# ☄️ HandPiston - Java ☄️
# 


**What is it?**
The Hand Piston mod allows you to use piston functionality directly in your hand! No need for blocks or redstone; you can push or pull blocks with total ease. 🚀

**How does it work?**
1. Hand Piston (Normal): Pushes blocks forward, just like a regular piston. 🟦➡️
2. Hand Piston (Slime): Pulls blocks towards you, simulating a slime piston. 🟦⬅️


**Dependency: Geckolib**
- "GeckoLib is an animation and rendering engine for Minecraft Mods".
 

**Created by:**
Made by "Eu, Marko!" for the video "CRIEI MOD pq ERREI o ÚLTIMO VIDRO... DE NOVO - Minecraft". 🎥
(Watch: [YT Link](https://youtube.com/shorts/yDDR61hP27w))


Only for Minecraft Java - Forge - 1.20.1. ⚒️

Bedrock addon version: ...
